title: March 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 30''' is the 89th day of the year (90th in leap years). There are 276 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s|1958]] – [[Maurice LaMarche]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Matt Doran]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Pete Holmes]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[Jedi that Was, Jedi to Be]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Víctor Manuel Leza Moreno]] is born.
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 93|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 93]] published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 13]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2011]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 3|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 3]] published.
*2011 – [[Legacy—War 4|''Legacy—War'' 4]] published.
*2011 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 61|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 61]] released.
*2011 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 62|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 62]] released.
*[[2012]] – [[Ivy Wong]] is born.
*[[2016]] – "[[Twilight of the Apprentice]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2021]] – ''[[The Mandalorian: Season 1: Volume 1]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Dooku: Jedi Lost (script)|''Dooku: Jedi Lost'' script]] published in paperback.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 201|''Star Wars Insider'' 201]] published.
*2021 – "[[Yoda and Other Users of the Force]]" published in Spanish.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Padmé's Real Last Name|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Padmé's Real Last Name]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Bounty Hunters 21|''Bounty Hunters'' 21]] published.
*[[2025]] – "[[The Helpful Harvester / Little Lost Droid]]" and "[[Tenoo's Fastest / Home Sweet Temple]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
<noinclude>
